name: soleon-deploy-agent
description: Convert a local Claude Code agent identity (.claude/agents/<name>.md) into a validated, deploy-ready agent-infra POST /agents request via an Allium specification. Distill, elicit gaps, and validate fully offline; then deploy the confirmed assets via the Soleon MCP server.
license: MIT (bundled allium engine also MIT, see LICENSES/)

soleon_token.title: Soleon access token
soleon_token.description: Temporal JWT for the Soleon MCP Server while the OAuth 2.1 infrastructure is built
